content.name: spell_effect
content.text: Effect: When the Dream Hunter releases the skill, there is a chance to launch a spell to control it

content.name: ice_effect
content.text: Effect: Slow Down Dream Hunter Attack Speed

content.name: entrapment_effect
content.text: Effect: Shoots a net at fleeing Dream Hunter

content.name: barb_effect
content.text: Effect: When the door is attacked, it deals 1% of the maximum HP damage to the Dream Hunter every second

content.name: guillotine_effect
content.text: Effect: When the Dream Hunter's HP is lower than 20 HP, it will directly deal 10% of the Dream Hunter's maximum HP as damage

content.name: repair_effect
content.text: Effect: Restores the door's HP volume per second, this effect has no distance limit

content.name: energyhood_effect
content.text: Effect: Generates an invincible energy shield when the door's HP is lower than 30 HP

content.name: smoney_effect
content.text: Effect: Grants the turret the ability to steal Gold Coins, depending on the level of the turret

content.name: longrange_effect
content.text: Effect: Increases the attack range of the turret

content.name: solenoid_effect
content.text: Effect: The closer the Dream Hunter is, the faster the turret will attack

content.name: LanguageTip
content.text: The language system has been updated, please exit the game and re-enter!

content.name: gaoshiText
content.text:
1. When the red countdown appears, please enter a room immediately and go to bed.
2. Please do not follow other people to enter a room. If you find someone else lying on the bed after you enters a room, please leave it ASAP.
3. Go to bed directly after entering a room. You may increase gold coins by sleeping and upgrading your bed, build and upgrade turrets,etc to kill the dream hunter.
4. If someone is breaking your door, press the Repair button to repair it. 
5. If you find that the light in other room gets off, please neither go check that room nor remove the facilities there.
6.There is a honey badger store in the building where you can buy game items.

content.name: agreeText
content.text: Hello dear players! This game involves some horror scenes. Teenagers please get your parents' consent before playing. It's recommended that people who are sensitive to thrilling and scary scenes quit the game. Please read the above tips carefully before entering the game.

content.name: SkipTitle
content.text: Would you like to rate Haunted Dorm?

content.name: textAIArr
text: Even a landlord doesn't have extra food to spare.
I won't let you go even if I'm a ghost.
Can you go to others’ room?
Why has my room become empty?
This way is not too good, right?
I'm as poor as a church mouse!I
There are three game consoles next door!
I can have a break now.
I am lucky to have you in my life.
I'm happy to have you by my side!
I learned a lot from you!
This is my room, not yours.
